creator: marco.broeder@posteo.eu
text:
Hello,

I was trying to register a FreeBSD Bugzilla account which I need as maintainer of some ports. It surprisingly failed. An account with my email address (marco.broeder@posteo.eu) already exists. What? I had never register one! And of course I did not know the password. I did not even know there was an account. Fortunately, password reset worked and I was able to gain access.

Then I tried to register an account with an old (now stale) address of mine (marco.broeder@gmx.eu): account already registered. Second unknown account: password reset to gain access. I was lucky that I still had access to that email account from this provider, because it expires in the next few weeks.

And I actually do not know if I used other (now stale) email addresses.

Long story short:

Could you merge the two accounts (those I know) into just one account, please?

OLD: marco.broeder@gmx.eu   -->   NEW: marco.broeder@posteo.eu

Thank you very much!

Regards,
Marco

PS: I do not want to sound angry, because I am not. Many thanks for finally deprecating GNATS! I very much appreciate it! I was just very surprised. I thought everybody has to register to create an account. There was no notification at all: neither directly from Bugzilla nor from the mailing list announcement.

I really hope you did not create an account for every email address from GNATS database! Then you would have lots of stale accounts and lots of people not knowing they have an account, not to mention their unknown passwords.
